allow: PowerShell(git --version; gh --version; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum | Select-Object Count, @{n='MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Sum/1MB,2\)}})

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 50MB } | Select-Object @{n='MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}}, FullName; Write-Output "--- top dirs ---"; Get-ChildItem -Directory | ForEach-Object { $s=\(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{Dir=$_.Name; MB=[math]::Round\($s/1MB,2\)} })
PowerShell(git --no-pager diff --stat; Write-Output "--- so bai social con lai ---"; \(Select-String -Path "creative-portfolio.html" -Pattern 'data-cat="social"'\).Count)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "works/social/post-20-bds","works/social/post-24-bds" | Select-Object @{n='Dir';e={$_.Directory.Name}}, Name, @{n='KB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime; Write-Output "--- git status ---"; git status --short)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "E:\\Cá nhân\\Portfolio 2026\\Bộ img up web\\Social" -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '20|24' } | Select-Object Name, @{n='KB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "E:\\Cá nhân\\Portfolio 2026\\Bộ img up web\\Social" -Force | Select-Object Mode, Name, @{n='KB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell($b="E:\\Cá nhân\\Portfolio 2026\\Bộ img up web\\Social"; Get-ChildItem "$b\\post 20_bds","$b\\post 24_bds" -File | Select-Object @{n='Dir';e={$_.Directory.Name}}, Name, @{n='KB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $b="E:\\Cá nhân\\Portfolio 2026\\Bộ img up web\\Social"; foreach\($f in @\("$b\\post 20_bds\\post20_final.png","$b\\post 24_bds\\post24_final.png"\)\){ $i=[System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($f\); "{0}: {1} x {2}" -f \(Split-Path $f -Leaf\), $i.Width, $i.Height; $i.Dispose\(\) }; Write-Output "--- tools ---"; foreach\($t in @\("cwebp","magick","ffmpeg","python"\)\){ $c=Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($c\){"$t : $\($c.Source\)"} else {"$t : khong co"} })

PowerShell(python -c "from PIL import Image; import glob; [print\(f, Image.open\(f\).size, round\(__import__\('os'\).path.getsize\(f\)/1024,1\),'KB'\) for f in ['works/social/post-20-bds/post20-final.webp','works/social/post-24-bds/post24-final.webp','works/social/post86-9proxypre/post86-final.webp']]")
PowerShell(git --no-pager diff 8f48a94 -- creative-portfolio.html; Write-Output "=== so bai social ==="; \(Select-String -Path "creative-portfolio.html" -Pattern 'data-cat="social"'\).Count)

PowerShell(py -3 -c "from PIL import Image; [ \(lambda im: print\(f, im.size, im.mode, 'OK'\)\)\(Image.open\(f\).copy\(\)\) for f in ['works/social/post-20-bds/post20-final.webp','works/social/post-24-bds/post24-final.webp'] ]")
